title: SEC EDGAR Filing Monitor
description: Monitor SEC EDGAR for new 8-K (material events), Form 4 (insider trading), and 13F (institutional portfolio) filings by ticker symbol. Sends Telegram and/or webhook alerts on new filings.

tickers.title: Tickers to monitor
tickers.description: List of stock ticker symbols to monitor (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, NVDA). Leave empty to monitor all recent filings.

form_types.title: Filing types to monitor
form_types.description: Which SEC form types to fetch.

delta_mode.title: Delta mode (only new filings)
delta_mode.description: Only return filings not seen in previous runs. Uses Apify KV Store for deduplication.

days_back.title: Days back (initial run)
days_back.description: On the first run (no history), fetch filings from the last N days. Subsequent runs use delta mode.

max_filings_per_ticker.title: Max filings per ticker
max_filings_per_ticker.description: Maximum filings to fetch per ticker per run. 0 = unlimited.

insider_transaction_types.title: Form 4: Transaction types to alert on
insider_transaction_types.description: Filter Form 4 filings by transaction type. Leave empty for all.

min_insider_value_usd.title: Form 4: Minimum transaction value (USD)
min_insider_value_usd.description: Only alert on insider transactions above this USD value. 0 = all transactions.

telegram_bot_token.title: Telegram bot token
telegram_bot_token.description: Your Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Use an Apify Secret for security (e.g. @TELEGRAM_TOKEN).

telegram_chat_id.title: Telegram chat ID
telegram_chat_id.description: Your Telegram chat or group ID. Get it from @userinfobot.

webhook_url.title: Webhook URL (optional)
webhook_url.description: POST new filings to this URL (Zapier, Make, n8n, etc.).
